terms.title: Terms of Service

sections.title: 1. Acceptance and eligibility
sections.body: By creating an account or using ReqsAI you accept these Terms. You must be at least 18 years old, and if you accept on behalf of an organization, you confirm that you are authorized to bind it.

sections.title: 2. Definitions
sections.body: “Service” means the ReqsAI platform; “Organization” the workspace you belong to; “Content” the data you submit, including meeting audio and transcripts; “Meeting Data” any recording or transcript processed by the Service.

sections.title: 3. The service and the license
sections.body: ReqsAI grants you a limited, revocable, non-exclusive license to use the Service to capture meetings and generate requirements artifacts. You may not reverse engineer, resell, abuse, or use it for unlawful purposes.

sections.title: 4. Accounts and organizations
sections.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your account data, for protecting your credentials, and for the actions of the members you invite to your Organization.

sections.title: 5. Meeting recording and consent
sections.body: You represent and warrant that, before recording or transcribing any meeting, you have obtained all consents required by law from each participant — some jurisdictions require the consent of all parties. ReqsAI provides a recording indicator, but your Organization is solely responsible for lawful capture and will indemnify Kntro-Soft S.A.C. against claims arising from a breach of this section.

sections.title: 6. AI-generated outputs
sections.body: User stories, suggestions, and other AI outputs are generated automatically, may be inaccurate or incomplete, and are provided for your review. They are not professional, legal, or business advice; review them before relying on them.

sections.title: 7. Your content and intellectual property
sections.body: You retain ownership of your Content and grant ReqsAI a limited license to process it solely to provide the Service. Kntro-Soft S.A.C. retains all rights to the platform, the software, and the trademarks.

sections.title: 8. Third-party AI subprocessors
sections.body: To provide the Service we use third-party AI providers — Deepgram (speech-to-text), Google Gemini (generation), and OpenAI (embeddings). Details are in our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 9. Model training
sections.body: We do not use your Content, nor data derived from it, to train the machine learning models of ReqsAI or of our subprocessors.

sections.title: 10. Fees and subscription
sections.body: Paid plans, when offered, are billed on a recurring basis and renew until cancelled. We may change prices with prior notice; the Service may be offered free of charge in whole or in part.

sections.title: 11. Termination and data export
sections.body: You may stop using the Service at any time. Upon termination, you will have a reasonable period to export your data before it is deleted, subject to the retention rules in the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 12. Warranties and limitation of liability
sections.body: The Service is provided “as is,” without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Kntro-Soft S.A.C. is not liable for indirect or consequential damages, and its total liability is limited to the amounts you paid in the previous twelve months.

sections.title: 13. Changes to these Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms; when their substantive content changes we will ask you to accept the new version. Continued use after an update constitutes acceptance.

sections.title: 14. Governing law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Peru, and any dispute is submitted to the competent courts of Peru.

terms.contact_before: Questions about these Terms may be sent to

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Write to us at hello@reqsai.com

items.q: How does ReqsAI work during a live meeting?
items.a: ReqsAI connects to your meeting audio (Zoom, Meet, Teams) or a recording file. While the analyst talks with the client, the AI engine transcribes in real time, detects implicit requirements, and suggests questions to reveal hidden edge cases. When the meeting ends, the system automatically generates User Stories with Gherkin acceptance criteria ready for review.

items.q: Is my data secure? How is it isolated between organizations?
items.a: We use a schema-per-tenant isolation architecture: each organization has its own completely separate database schema. No data crosses between tenants under any circumstances. RAG vectors are also stored per tenant. We comply with enterprise security standards and can provide technical isolation documentation to your legal team during Enterprise onboarding.

items.q: Do I need to install any software or plugin?
items.a: No. ReqsAI runs 100% in the cloud from the browser. For live meetings we offer a recording bot that automatically joins your Zoom or Meet room — nothing to install on your computer. For existing recordings, simply upload the audio or video file directly from the platform.

items.q: What tools does ReqsAI integrate with?
items.a: The Pro plan includes integration with Jira (Cloud and Server) and Azure DevOps. Approved User Stories export directly as issues with the correct fields pre-filled. We also offer webhooks for custom integrations in the Enterprise plan. Coming soon: Linear, Notion, and GitHub Issues.

items.q: Can I analyze recordings from previous meetings?
items.a: Yes. In addition to live mode, you can upload MP3, MP4, WAV files or import from Google Drive and OneDrive. The engine processes the audio, identifies requirements, and generates the same structured output as a live session. Ideal for teams that want to feed historical context back into the RAG system.

items.q: How accurate is the generated Gherkin? How much editing is needed?
items.a: In sessions with good audio quality and structured conversations, analysts report an average of under 15 minutes of editing per session. The system learns from your project history via RAG, improving accuracy with each session. All stories go through a review and approval flow before export, so the team always has final control.

items.q: What languages does the AI support?
items.a: The transcription and analysis engine natively supports Spanish, English, and Portuguese — the three most common languages in LATAM tech teams. Gherkin can be generated in whichever language you prefer. The platform UI is available in Spanish and English.

items.q: How does the 14-day trial period work?
items.a: When you sign up, your account is in Trial status with full access to the Pro plan for 14 days — no credit card required. You can process real meetings, invite your team, and export to Jira. At the end of the period we notify you in advance and you can continue with a paid plan or switch to the free Starter plan without losing your data.

features.title: Everything your team needs to elicit requirements perfectly
features.subtitle: From the meeting to a sprint-ready backlog, without friction.
features.live_desc: Real-time prompts during client meetings to surface hidden edge cases and logic gaps before the call ends.
features.gherkin_desc: Structured Given-When-Then acceptance criteria generated instantly from meeting transcripts, ready to export.
features.rag_desc: Detects requirement duplication and automatically aligns with your existing architecture using your project history.
features.privacy_desc: Schema-per-tenant isolation to guarantee that each organization's data is completely separate and secure.
features.jira_desc: Export approved User Stories directly to your Jira or Azure DevOps backlog with one click, in under 10 minutes.
features.collab_desc: Share, comment and approve User Stories with the whole team before they reach the sprint. Full traceability included.
